properties.displayName: ERP - Admin Role Activation Outside Business Hours
properties.description: Detects privileged role activations in PIM occurring outside of standard business hours (before 7am or after 7pm AEST, or on weekends). Maps to MITRE ATT&CK T1078.004 - Cloud Accounts.
properties.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where OperationName has_any (
    "Add eligible member to role in PIM completed",
    "Add member to role in PIM completed (permanent)",
    "Add member to role completed"
)
| extend
    InitiatedByUPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
    RoleName = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName),
    HourOfDay = hourofday(TimeGenerated),
    DayOfWeek = dayofweek(TimeGenerated)
| where HourOfDay < 7 or HourOfDay > 19
    or DayOfWeek == time(0) or DayOfWeek == time(6d)
| extend
    MITRETechnique = "T1078.004 - Cloud Accounts",
    RiskLevel = "Medium",
    Reason = case(
        DayOfWeek == time(0) or DayOfWeek == time(6d), "Weekend activation",
        HourOfDay < 7, "Before business hours",
        "After business hours"
    )
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    InitiatedByUPN,
    RoleName,
    HourOfDay,
    DayOfWeek,
    Reason,
    MITRETechnique,
    RiskLevel,
    CorrelationId
